Configuration:
  pulumi:pulumi:Stack: (same)
    [urn=urn:pulumi:dev::myproject::pulumi:pulumi:Stack::myproject-dev]
- my:component:Grandchild: (delete)
    [id=mygrandchild-id]
    [urn=urn:pulumi:dev::myproject::my:component:Grandchild::mygrandchild]
- my:component:Child: (delete)
    [urn=urn:pulumi:dev::myproject::my:component:Child::mychild]
    - my:component:Parent: (delete)
        [urn=urn:pulumi:dev::myproject::my:component:Parent::myparent]
